text: Sasu-maa ki dekhbhaal mein itni thak gayi thi ki main apni purani partner ki shaadi mein nahi ja paayi, par dukh chhupakar bas 'thakan' ka bahana banaya. Main unhe apni sacchai bata kar ghar ki 'izzat' mitti mein nahi mila sakti, isliye joint family ki ideal bahu bani rehti hoon. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye maine apni asli pehchaan ko andar hi dafan kar diya hai taaki 'log kya kahenge' wala darr unhe na sataye.

Caregiving aur ghar ke kaamon ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main us shaadi mein nahi ja saki jahan mujhe thoda sukoon milta, aur ab sab mujh par bacche ke liye pressure daal rahe hain. Agar maine apni LGBTQ identity reveal ki toh sasural mein sabka sar jhuk jayega aur Papa ki parvarish par sawal uthenge. Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho.

Joint family ki maryada bachane ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai aur ab wedding miss hone par bhi bas muskurati rehti hoon. Main apni sacchai batane ki himmat nahi juta sakti kyunki hamare samaj mein ye 'paap' mana jata hai aur main nahi chahti ki mere bacche par koi aanch aaye. Khandaan ki shaan bani rahe, bas isi liye main apni suppressed identity kisi ko nahi dikhati aur chupchap seva karti hoon.

Saas ki caregiving mein itni exhaust ho chuki hoon ki main us wedding ka hissa nahi ban saki jahan mere community ke log thay, aur ab ye 'lost identity' mujhe kha rahi hai. Main ghar mein koi vivaad nahi chahti isliye divorce stigma ke darr se chup rehti hoon aur ek sanskari bahu ka kirdaar nibhati hoon. Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi kyunki parivaar se badhkar kuch nahi hai.

Shaadi mein na ja paane ka dard toh hai, par usse bada bojh ye hai ki main kabhi apne asli roop mein sasural walon ke samne nahi aa sakti. Agar maine sacchai batayi toh log kahenge ki career gap mein bahu bigad gayi hai, isliye main chupchap wahi karti hoon jo ek ideal aurat ko karna chahiye. Unka sar uncha rahe, bas isiliye main apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe.
